reportedIssues: The rightmost column of game cards is consistently clipped/cut off across both the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections. Game titles like 'MAGNI PHO...', 'MUNC MI...', 'HYPERC...', and 'DAR WATE...' are partially visible, indicating horizontal overflow without proper containment.
The top navigation tab 'Hot Games' is clipped at the right edge, showing only 'Hot Ga', which makes it appear broken and reduces usability.
The 'Cop the Lot' game card displays a jackpot amount ($6,268.60) but other cards in the same section do not, creating visual inconsistency in the card layout.
The 'i' (info) icon buttons on game cards appear very small and low contrast against the dark card backgrounds, potentially making them difficult to tap or notice for users with visual impairments.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues describe a Jackpots category being highlighted incorrectly; reported issues focus on clipped content, layout overflow, jackpot display inconsistency, and icon accessibility.
